name: Crustless Brownie Pie
recipeInstructions: Combine the first 7 ingredients in a bowl. Beat for 4 minutes at medium speed with an electric mixer. Stir in the pecans. Spread the batter evenly in a buttered 9-inch pie plate. Bake at 325°F for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. The pie will puff and then fall slightly. Serve with whipped cream. Yield: one 9-inch pie.
